summary: The diff implements REQ-21 by seeding 20+ demo items in the backend (backend/main.mo) across categories including Books (Textbooks), Calculator, Sports, Lab Equipment, Electronics, and Hostel Essentials, each with a per-day price in the ₹5–₹50 range, a hostel-based location string, and a plausible kebab-case owner principal that renders as a display name. The frontend (BorrowPage.tsx, ItemDetailModal.tsx) is updated to display owner display names and handle the demo data. All major acceptance criteria appear addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added with a run function to handle state migration on canister upgrades.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-21 only requests pre-populating demo data. A formal migration module was not requested in the build request, though it is a minor infrastructure addition rather than a user-facing feature.
